# Rasoi Buddy

> Rasoi Buddy is a digital kitchen hub for Indian households. Scan grocery bills, track pantry expiry, get smart meal ideas, and coordinate with your cook via WhatsApp.

Rasoi Buddy helps families waste less food, plan smarter meals, and run calmer kitchens. The mobile app is available on Google Play (com.kitchenai.app).

## Product

- [Home](https://www.rasoibuddy.com/): Landing page with features, pricing, and download links
- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.kitchenai.app): Download the Android app

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.rasoibuddy.com/privacy): How we collect, use, and protect your data

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.rasoibuddy.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public pages
